plan_metadata.name: group  validation Sample Msgext Search Python

steps.description: Click the "Search (Ctrl+Alt+E)" input box at the top of the Microsoft Teams web interface to activate search functionality.

Type text: 'haolong' into the top search input box within the Microsoft Teams web interface, located in a popup overlay with filtering options for Messages, Files, Images, Group Chats, Meetings, and Channels.
Click the "Long Hao" chat result in the search dropdown within the Microsoft Teams web interface after searching for "haolong".
Click the "Actions and apps" button (red plus icon) at the bottom right of the chat input area in the Microsoft Teams web interface to open app and messaging extension options.
Type text  ${{var:app_name}}  into the "Get more apps" search field in the Microsoft Teams web interface, located within the Chat tab conversation view.
Click the search-extension-settings app entry in the app search results panel within the Microsoft Teams web interface, just below the search bar and above the "Add a new app" section.
Click the "Your search query" text input field within the "search-extension-sett..." pop-up window in Microsoft Teams chat interface.
Type text 'npm' into the search-extension-settings popup input field within the Microsoft Teams chat interface on a Chrome browser tab.
Click the "npm" search result in the extension search dropdown within the Microsoft Teams web app chat interface.
Click the "Send" button in the message input section of the Microsoft Teams web chat interface to send a message in the conversation with Long Hao.
